chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5801 of 2024 M/s Bhombhal & Company Marine Inspections & another Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.26267/24 2. For orders on Misc. No.26268/24 3. For orders as to non-prosecution. Dated: 22.11.2024 Mr. Shayan Ahmed for petitioners. -.-.- 1) Urgency granted. 2) Through instant application this petition is being withdrawn on the count that the petitioners would seek redressal of their grievances before the Grievance Redressal Committee (GRC). The application is accordingly granted and the petition is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending application. Chief Justice Judge
